name: Pizza Snack
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together 1 cup of flour, sugar, salt, oregano, and dry yeast.
2. Add the warm water and softened margarine to the dry ingredients. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed on an electric mixer.
3. Gradually add an additional 3/4 cup of flour while continuing to beat at high speed for 2 more minutes.
4. Stir in enough remaining flour until a stiff dough forms. Knead the dough for 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Grease a bowl and turn the dough to coat the top. Cover and let rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
6. Punch down the dough. Divide into 8 equal pieces and shape into balls. Cover and let rest for 10 minutes.
7. Roll and stretch each ball into a 5-inch circle. Place on greased baking sheets sprinkled with cornmeal.
8. Form the edges of each circle into a standing rim of dough. Let rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
9. Preheat oven to 375°F. Spread each round with 2 tablespoons of pizza sauce and sprinkle with cheese and your favorite toppings.
10. Bake for an additional 10 minutes.
